title: T.N. Assembly election: AIADMK is just a mask for BJP, says Rahul Gandhi at Ponneri
description: “There is no real AIADMK ... So when you see the AIADMK, its flag, its leaders, remember that they are controlled by Narendra Modi [Prime Minister] and Amit Shah [Union Home Minister] and are being used to attack Tamil history, culture, and language,” Mr. Gandhi said
